ddls:
CREATE TABLE "graduation_statistics" (
  "batch" TEXT /* Academic year batch (e.g., 2015-19) */,
  "year_start" INTEGER /* Start year of the batch */,
  "year_end" INTEGER /* End year of the batch */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the batch */,
  "total_students_registered" INTEGER /* Total number of students registered at the start of the batch */,
  "students_withdrawn" INTEGER /* Number of students who withdrew before graduation */,
  "students_deferred" INTEGER /* Number of students who deferred graduation */,
  "students_repeating" INTEGER /* Number of students who repeated a year */,
  "first_class_distinction" INTEGER /* Number of students who graduated with First Class with Distinction */,
  "first_class" INTEGER /* Number of students who graduated with First Class */,
  "second_class" INTEGER /* Number of students who graduated with Second Class */,
  "total_graduates" INTEGER /* Total number of students who graduated */,
  "average_gpa" REAL /* Average GPA of the graduating students */,
  "highest_gpa" REAL /* Highest GPA among the graduating students */,
  "lowest_gpa" REAL /* Lowest GPA among the graduating students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  "batch" TEXT /* Academic year batch of the student */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Graduation classification (e.g., First Class with Distinction, First Class, Second Class) */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Graduation GPA */,
  "thesis_title" TEXT /* Title of the thesis (if applicable) */,
  "thesis_advisor" TEXT /* Name of the thesis advisor (if applicable) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the student belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_batch FOREIGN KEY ("batch") REFERENCES graduation_statistics ("batch")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "faculty" TEXT /* Faculty the department belongs to */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the department */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department (e.g., building and room number) */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the department was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
column_names: Total number of students in the batch
Total number of students registered at the start of the batch
Number of students who withdrew before graduation
Number of students who deferred graduation
Number of students who repeated a year
Number of students who graduated with First Class with Distinction
Number of students who graduated with First Class
Number of students who graduated with Second Class
Total number of students who graduated
Average GPA of the graduating students
Highest GPA among the graduating students
Lowest GPA among the graduating students
Date of birth of the student
Academic year batch of the student
Graduation classification (e.g., First Class with Distinction, First Class, Second Class)
Name of the thesis advisor (if applicable)
Contact phone number of the department
Location of the department (e.g., building and room number)
